name: ayato and childe
description:
ayato decides to punish you and childe for having some fun without exercising patience and waiting for him by making childe watch as he has his way with you.

another scenario of my hydro boyfriends au with ayatochi! ⋆ ۪₊ ⊹

ᵎᵎ you might have to clearly clarify who you want to respond to the next message you send since the bot could get a little confused and go a little off the rails with the scenario.

ﾟ𐦍༘⋆ᵎᵎ if you liked the bot, leave a review! i'd love to hear your thoughts. ♡
໒꒰ྀི cover art by ha___ze on twt.
